src/main/java/com/test/catalog/domain/en._comment: Lifecycle enum: VALID_TRANSITIONS map + canTransitionTo + transitionTo machine. DRAFT has two outbound transitions (ACTIVE, DISCONTINUED); ACTIVE one (DISCONTINUED); DISCONTINUED none.
Classification enum: only literals, no state machine (no VALID_TRANSITIONS).

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/domain/ag._comment: Aggregate: activate() method has transitionTo(ACTIVE) detected from enum; discontinue() has transitionTo(DISCONTINUED).
